name: Chilly Tomato Bisque Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender container, combine the vegetable juice cocktail, yogurt, tomatoes (about 4), basil leaves, salt, and black pepper.
2. Cover and blend at medium speed until smooth.
3. Cover and refrigerate several hours to allow flavors to meld.
Note: Canadian Diabetic Choices
Each Serving: 1 cup
1/2 Protein Choice
1 Fruits & Vegetables Choice
Source: Healthy Choices
Everyday Recipes for Healthy Eating
Recipes selected by Sheila Walker and Edited by Beverley Renaham
Published in cooperation with the Canadian Diabetes Association
ISBN 0-7715-9163
